summary: Iteration 46: Tested Google Sheets integration no-regression + reservation import feature. All backend APIs working correctly. Admin portfolio sync page loads with new reservation-import blocks. Agency hotels page loads correctly with sheet_managed_inventory fields. Graceful degradation when Google credentials not configured.
passed_tests: GET /api/admin/sheets/templates returns 200 with downloadable_templates, inventory_sync, reservation_writeback, checklist
GET /api/admin/sheets/templates checklist mentions incoming_reservation for reservation import
GET /api/agency/hotels returns 200 with 7 hotels including sheet_managed_inventory fields
Agency hotels include sheet fields: sheet_managed_inventory, allocation_available, sheet_inventory_date, sheet_last_sync_at, sheet_last_sync_status, sheet_reservations_imported
Admin Portfolio Sync page (/app/admin/portfolio-sync) loads without crash/blank
SheetTemplateCenter component shows: Envanter Sync CSV, Rezervasyon Write-back CSV buttons, required fields (Tarih, Oda Tipi, Fiyat, Kontenjan)
NEW: Reservation import note visible: 'Rezervasyonları sheet'ten içeri almak için Rezervasyonlar sekmesinde Kayit Tipi = incoming_reservation veya external_reservation kullanın'
NEW: Write-Back panel shows: 'Aynı Rezervasyonlar sekmesi artık iki yönlü çalışır'
Kurulum checklist step #4 mentions importing reservations from sheets
Portfolio Sağlık Paneli shows: 4 Toplam Bağlantı, 4 Aktif Sync, 4 Yapılandırılmamış (graceful degradation)
Sheet Bağlantıları table shows 4 hotel connections with Write-back: Rezervasyonlar badges
Agency Hotels page (/app/agency/hotels) loads with 7 hotels displaying status badges
Existing test suites pass: test_admin_sheets_management.py (5/5), test_agency_sheets_api.py (14/14), test_sheets_iteration46.py (13/13)
critical_code_review_comments: All endpoints return proper graceful degradation payloads when Google credentials not configured
Agency hotels endpoint correctly includes new sheet sync fields in response
Frontend components use proper data-testid attributes for testability
Reservation import flow properly documented in both template checklist and UI panels
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 46 verified Google Sheets integration no-regression and new reservation import feature. Service account is NOT configured - all tests verified graceful not-configured behavior. Key new features verified: (1) incoming_reservation text visible in SheetTemplateCenter, (2) Write-Back panel shows bidirectional sync explanation, (3) Agency hotels endpoint returns sheet_managed_inventory and related fields. Frontend loads correctly without errors. 32 backend tests pass.

mocked_apis.note: Google Sheets API not configured - integration shows graceful degradation
